report.summary: Cycle-close sweep complete: PUBLISH_QUEUE holds 2 ready guides (bittensor-tao + stablecoin-yield), deployment 25ebFpMMz remains current, all 6 API routes structurally healthy but 0/6 rate-limited — programmer task persists as top blocker ahead of FOMC week.

sections.title: QA — Page & Build Health
items: ✅ All 4 recently touched pages have page.tsx: /learn/bitcoin-treasury-companies-guide, /learn/crypto-debit-cards-guide-2026, /learn/bittensor-tao-guide, /learn/stablecoin-yield-strategies-2026
✅ Metadata validated on all 4 pages — title, description, OG title/description all present and populated
✅ Structured data (JSON-LD) imports confirmed on both PUBLISH_QUEUE pages (bittensor-tao-guide, stablecoin-yield-strategies-2026) — pre-publish SEO gate passes

⚠️ TypeScript: 2 files with errors — src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts (8 JSX-in-.ts errors, pre-existing) + src/components/AICourseRecommendations.tsx (curly apostrophes, carry-over). Non-blocking: ignoreBuildErrors: true in next.config.ts; Vercel builds proceed cleanly
✅ No new regressions introduced this cycle — error count unchanged vs EOD v2 (57 errors, same 2 files)

sections.title: Data Engineer — API Health
items: ✅ All 6 public API routes confirmed present: /api/prices (60s TTL), /api/trending (300s TTL), /api/fear-greed (600s TTL), /api/market-metrics (60s TTL), /api/market-dominance (300s TTL), /api/defi-yields (variable TTL)

✅ CDN cache headers confirmed on routes: trending (s-maxage=300, stale-while-revalidate=600), fear-greed (s-maxage=600, stale-while-revalidate=1200), market-dominance (revalidate=300) — in-memory + edge layers operational
✅ Fallback data present on /api/prices and /api/market-dominance — both will serve hardcoded data if upstream fails

⚠️ No hardcoded fallback on /api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-metrics, /api/defi-yields — these routes have catch blocks and stale cache but no hardcoded last-resort data. Risk: if cache is cold AND upstream API is down, these return errors

🔴 Rate limiting: 0/6 routes protected — token bucket exists in src/lib/rate-limiter.ts but checkRateLimit() not wired into any public API route. High-priority programmer task before FOMC traffic spike (T-3 days)

sections.title: DevOps — Deployment Status
items: ✅ Latest deployment 25ebFpMMz: triggered during prior publish cycle (7 pages Day 33 batch), supersedes G7qnG32bm — expected status Ready/Current (Jefe: verify in Vercel dashboard if not already confirmed)
✅ Build config healthy: ignoreBuildErrors: true, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency: 4, workerThreads: false, output: standalone — all correct for Vercel serverless
✅ No new deployment triggered this cycle — no pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES, no code commits — 25ebFpMMz remains current and appropriate

⚠️ Uncommitted local changes detected in working tree: middleware.ts, next.config.ts, public/sw.js, airdrops/page.tsx + several new API routes and compare pages staged but not committed. These are NOT yet on Vercel
⚠️ Vercel trial expiry: ~10 days remaining — Jefe action required to add payment method and prevent service disruption
⚡ Live endpoint health: egress to degen0x.com blocked in sandbox — cannot verify HTTP 200s directly. No anomaly flags from prior cycle data; assume stable unless Vercel dashboard shows otherwise

sections.title: Project Manager — Cycle Summary & Carry-Overs
items: SHIPPED ✅ This cycle (EOD sweep): Full QA + Data + DevOps + PM cycle-close executed — no regressions detected, 2 PUBLISH_QUEUE pages pre-validated and ready to promote
CARRY-OVER 🔴 Rate limiter wiring — /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics (+ 3 others) — 0/6 routes protected; ~30-min programmer task; FOMC week traffic expected T-3 days (Wed Mar 19)
CARRY-OVER 🔴 WalletConnect production Project ID — Jefe action required; no wallet connect on any of 323 live pages; blocks gamification + referral attribution
CARRY-OVER 🔴 GitHub Actions secrets — Jefe action ~15 min; blocks Playwright CI before Sprint 60 merges
CARRY-OVER 🟡 AICourseRecommendations.tsx — 2 non-blocking curly apostrophe TS errors; quick fix queued
CARRY-OVER 🟡 Vercel trial expiry — ~10 days; Jefe payment method needed
OPEN 🟡 PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items ready — /learn/bittensor-tao-guide + /learn/stablecoin-yield-strategies-2026; SEO-validated, structured data confirmed; promote in next publish cycle
UPCOMING ⚡ FOMC window T-3 (Wed Mar 19) — content opportunity: rate-decision-sensitive crypto yield/DCA/staking angles; last build window before event
